empty.noneInstalledDesc: Add from the community registry or define a custom server in your Space config.
empty.noMatchDesc: Try adjusting your search or filters

features.noneDiscoveredHint: Features will appear after the server initializes

offline.registryOffline: Registry offline - showing cached server info

toast.accountCreated: Account created — configure it from My Servers
toast.invalidSemver: Pinned version must be a valid semver (e.g. 1.2.3)
toast.cannotPin: Could not determine a valid version to pin
toast.upToDate: Server package is up to date
toast.gatewayPortFallback: Preferred port was in use — gateway is now on :{{port}}. Update IDE configs.

configModal.title: Configure {{name}}
configModal.defaultInstructions: Enter the required configuration to enable this server.
configModal.displayNameDesc: Shown in My Servers only. Does not change the server ID or tool names.
configModal.envVarsStdio: Additional environment variables for the server process
configModal.httpHeadersDesc: Custom HTTP headers sent with each request
configModal.pinnedVersionDesc: Exact semver injected on every spawn (e.g. 1.2.3)
configModal.defaultParamsDesc: JSON object merged into every tool call for this server. Example:

cloneModal.title: Add another account
cloneModal.subtitle: Clone {{name}} with a separate credential set
cloneModal.displayNameDesc: Shown in My Servers only. Leave blank to use the default.
cloneModal.accountLabelDesc: Used in the server ID and tool prefix (e.g. work, personal)
cloneModal.collisionError: An account with this label already exists in this space
cloneModal.headersPreviewDesc: Header names from the source account are copied into the new clone. Update their values in Configure before enabling.
cloneModal.headersPreviewEmpty: No custom HTTP headers on the source account.
cloneModal.footerNote: The clone copies the server definition and HTTP header overrides from the source. Swap account-specific header values in Configure before enabling.

cloneAuthWarning.banner: This clone may be using the wrong credentials — review its headers in Configure.
cloneAuthWarning.connectToast: This clone is missing HTTP headers from its source — review Configure before connecting.

uninstallClones.title: Uninstall server with account clones?
uninstallClones.description_one: {{sourceName}} has {{count}} account clone in this space: {{dependentList}}.
uninstallClones.description_other: {{sourceName}} has {{count}} account clones in this space: {{dependentList}}.
uninstallClones.hint: Uninstalling the source leaves clones installed and working. You can also remove everything at once.

addMenu.discoverDesc: Browse the community catalog — install with guided setup, OAuth, and credential fields.
addMenu.customDesc: Guided setup for local CLIs, private servers, or anything not in the registry.
addMenu.viewManifestDesc: Edit the entire Space JSON file — all servers, metadata, and raw config.

filters.combineHint: Combine status filters (e.g. Connected + Error). All = no status filter.

notify.label: Notify
notify.description: Surface available updates without changing packages automatically

auto.label: Auto
auto.description: Always resolve the latest package on reconnect (npx/uvx servers only)

pinned.label: Pinned
pinned.description: Lock to a specific version on every spawn

configEditorModal.title: Custom Server Configuration
configEditorModal.subtitle: {{spaceName}} · JSON config
configEditorModal.insertServerTitle: Insert another unique custom server entry
configEditorModal.keyboardHints: Ctrl/Cmd+S save · Ctrl/Cmd+Shift+F format · Ctrl/Cmd+F search
configEditorModal.editorLoadFailed: Editor failed to load. You can still edit JSON below, or restart the app.

toast.savedBody: JSON saved to disk. Server sync runs in the background.
toast.syncFailedBody: {{message}} — JSON is on disk; fix the entry and save again.
toast.syncPartialAdopted_one: {{count}} server took over an existing entry

customServerPanel.title: Add Custom Server
customServerPanel.serverIdDesc: Dictionary key under mcpServers — must be unique in this space.

form.requiredSectionDesc: Minimum fields to define this server
form.optionalSectionDesc: Description, args, credentials schema, and defaults
form.displayNameDesc: Shown in My Servers only. Does not change the server ID or tool names.
form.transportTypeDesc: stdio runs a local command; http connects to a remote URL.
form.commandDesc: Executable to spawn (e.g. npx, node, docker)
form.urlDesc: HTTP endpoint for the MCP server
form.envVarsStdio: Environment variables passed to the server process
form.httpHeadersDesc: Custom HTTP headers sent with each request
form.inputDefsDesc: Credential fields users fill in after install (referenced as ${input:ID} in env/headers)
form.defaultParamsDesc: JSON object merged into every tool call for this server. Example:

validation.commandRequired: Command is required for stdio transport
validation.urlRequired: URL is required for http transport
validation.defaultParamsInvalid: Default tool parameters must be valid JSON object

customServerPanel.editorLoadFailed: Editor failed to load. You can still edit JSON below.

toast.savedBody: Server entry saved to your space config.

definitionModal.subtitle: Server Definition
definitionModal.editorLoadFailed: Editor failed to load. Showing plain JSON instead.
